# completeRequest()

**Instance Method**

Marks the action as complete.

## Declaration

```swift
func completeRequest()
```

## Discussion

Call this method when the action completes successfully.

## Completing the Action

- **cancelRequest(withError:)**: Cancels the action and returns the provided error.
